text.title: lang-go-tygo-frontend-contract Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for lang-go-tygo-frontend-contract as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Repo runs tygo locally only and the generated file is .gitignore-d.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: CI cannot diff what isn't tracked; drift becomes invisible until production. The only workable contract is "generated and committed".

failure-mode.description: Frontend wraps generated types with hand-written "richer" versions (Date instead of string, branded UUID).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Wrappers reintroduce drift one level up; instead, prefer a separate parsing layer that converts the generated string to Date at the network boundary, leaving the contract type unchanged.
